Question: Write the first five terms of the sequence defined by the explicit formula $$t_{n} = 5 n - 4.$$
Write the first five terms of the sequence. $$a_{n} = \frac{4 n}{( - 2 )^{n}}$$
Write the first six terms of the sequence. $$a_{n} = \{ \left .\begin{matrix}{aa}2 n^{3} & \text{if } n \text{is odd} \\ \frac{5 n}{2} & \text{if } n \text{is even}\end{matrix}\right .$$
Write an explicit formula for the $$n \text{th}$$ term of the sequence. $$\text{{9,} - \text{81,} \text{729,} - \text{6,561,} \text{59,049,} \text{unicode[:ddot.]}}$$
Write an explicit formula for the $$n \text{th}$$ term of the sequence. $$\{ - \frac{3}{4} , - \frac{9}{8} , - \frac{27}{12} , - \frac{81}{16} , - \frac{243}{20} , ... \}$$
Write an explicit formula for the $$n \text{th}$$ term of the sequence. $$\{ \frac{1}{e^{2}} , \  \frac{1}{e} , \  1 , \  e , \  e^{2} , ... \}$$
Write the first five terms of the sequence defined by the recursive formula. $$\left .\begin{matrix}{a}a_{1} = 2 \\ a_{n} = 2 a_{n - 1} + 1 \text{, for } n \geq 2\end{matrix}\right .$$

Write the first 8 terms of the sequence defined by the recursive formula. $$\left .\begin{matrix}{a}\left .\begin{matrix}{a} \\ a_{1} = 0\end{matrix}\right . \\ a_{2} = 1 \\ a_{3} = 1 \\ a_{n} = \frac{a_{n - 1}}{a_{n - 2}} + a_{n - 3} \text{, for } n \geq 4\end{matrix}\right .$$
Write the first five terms of the sequence defined by the explicit formula $$a_{n} = \frac{( n + 1 ) !}{2 n} .$$
